EquipmentService findAll() returns all equipment for a facility
EquipmentService findAll() applies status filter when provided
EquipmentService findAll() applies category filter when provided
EquipmentService findAll() does not apply filters when none are provided
EquipmentService findOne() returns equipment when found
EquipmentService findOne() throws NotFoundException when equipment not found
EquipmentService issueToPatient() creates a lease and updates equipment status to LEASED_OUT
EquipmentService issueToPatient() throws NotFoundException when equipment does not exist
EquipmentService createMaintenanceLog() creates and saves a maintenance log with facilityId
EquipmentService createMaintenanceLog() converts performedDate string to Date when provided
EquipmentService createMaintenanceLog() leaves performedDate undefined when not provided
EquipmentService returnFromPatient() updates lease to RETURNED and equipment to AVAILABLE
EquipmentService returnFromPatient() throws NotFoundException when lease is not found
VisitsService create() generates visitNumber and tokenNumber then saves the visit
VisitsService create() assigns tokenNumber = count + 1
VisitsService create() sets checkedInAt to current time
VisitsService findOne() returns the visit when found
VisitsService findOne() throws NotFoundException when visit does not exist
VisitsService updateStatus() sets nurseSeenAt when status is WITH_NURSE
VisitsService updateStatus() sets doctorSeenAt when status is WITH_DOCTOR
VisitsService updateStatus() sets completedAt when status is COMPLETED
VisitsService updateStatus() sets visitNotes when notes are provided
VisitsService cancel() sets status to CANCELLED and saves
VisitsService cancel() throws NotFoundException when visit is not found
VisitsService assignDoctor() sets doctorId on the visit
VisitsService assignDoctor() keeps status WAITING when visit is in REGISTERED state
VisitsService assignDoctor() does not change status when already WITH_NURSE
VisitsService completeVisit() sets COMPLETED status and completedAt timestamp
VisitsService markNoShow() sets status to NO_SHOW
VisitsService startTriage() sets WITH_NURSE status and nurseSeenAt
VisitsService startConsultation() sets WITH_DOCTOR status and doctorSeenAt
AppController (e2e) / (GET)
PaymentService createBill() creates and saves a bill with generated bill number
PaymentService createBill() sequences bill numbers correctly when a previous bill exists
PaymentService createBill() stores billDate as a Date object
PaymentService addItem() calculates amount as quantity × unitPrice
PaymentService addItem() throws NotFoundException when bill does not exist
PaymentService addItem() recalculates subtotal after adding item
PaymentService recordPayment() creates a SUCCESS transaction record
PaymentService recordPayment() marks bill as PAID when full amount is paid
PaymentService recordPayment() marks bill as PARTIAL when partial amount is paid
PaymentService recordPayment() throws NotFoundException when bill is not found
PaymentService getBill() returns the bill when found
PaymentService getBill() throws NotFoundException when bill does not exist
PaymentService getPatientBills() returns all bills for a patient ordered by createdAt DESC
NurseService recordVitals() computes BMI from weight and height
NurseService recordVitals() sets isCritical and criticalFlags when SpO2 is below 94
NurseService recordVitals() sets isCritical when systolic BP is above 180
NurseService recordVitals() sets isCritical when temperature is above 39 C
NurseService recordVitals() does NOT set isCritical when all vitals are within normal range
NurseService recordVitals() sets isCritical when pulse rate is below 50
NurseService recordVitals() omits BMI when weight or height is missing
NurseService getVitals() returns vitals for a visit ordered by recordedAt DESC
NurseService getVitals() returns an empty array when no vitals exist
NurseService createTriage() saves triage with triageById and triageAt set
NurseService getTriage() returns the triage when found
NurseService getTriage() throws NotFoundException when triage does not exist
NurseService createMar() saves MAR record with administeredById and scheduledAt
NurseService updateMarStatus() sets administeredAt when status changes to ADMINISTERED
NurseService updateMarStatus() does NOT set administeredAt for non-ADMINISTERED statuses
NurseService updateMarStatus() throws NotFoundException when MAR record is not found
NurseService getMarByVisit() returns MAR records ordered by scheduledAt ASC
EventsGateway should be defined
EventsGateway exposes the correct handler methods
EventsGateway afterInit() completes without throwing
EventsGateway handleConnection() disconnects a client that sends no token
EventsGateway handleConnection() accepts a client with a valid JWT and joins the facility room
EventsGateway handleConnection() disconnects a client whose JWT is invalid
EventsGateway handleConnection() does not call join() when payload has no facilityId
EventsGateway handleConnection() uses the token from handshake.query.token when handshake.auth.token is absent
EventsGateway handleDisconnect() completes without throwing for a normal disconnect
EventsGateway handleJoinQueue() joins the correct queue room and returns the ack payload
EventsGateway handleJoinBedBoard() joins the correct beds room and returns the ack payload
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() joins the user room when the socket user matches the requested userId
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() does NOT join the user room when userId does not match socket user
EventsGateway handleJoinUserRoom() returns { event: "user:joined" }
EventsGateway emitQueueUpdate() broadcasts to the facility room with event "queue:updated"
EventsGateway emitTokenCalled() broadcasts to the facility room with event "queue:token-called"
EventsGateway emitBedStatusChanged() broadcasts to the facility room with event "beds:status-changed"
EventsGateway emitCriticalAlert() broadcasts to the facility room with event "alert:critical-vitals"
EventsGateway emitOtUpdate() broadcasts to the facility room with event "ot:updated"
EventsGateway emitUserNotification() broadcasts to the user-specific room with event "notification:received"
EventsGateway broadcast isolation targets different facility rooms for different facilityIds
RoomService createRoom creates a room with the provided facilityId
RoomService createRoom saves and returns the new room
RoomService findRooms applies floor filter when floor is provided
RoomService findRooms applies type filter when type is provided
RoomService findRooms applies ward filter when ward is provided
RoomService findRooms returns all rooms when no filters are provided
RoomService createBed throws NotFoundException when room does not exist
RoomService createBed creates and saves a bed linked to the room
RoomService getBedBoard returns beds with a summary grouped by status
RoomService getBedBoard returns empty board when no beds exist
RoomService updateBedStatus throws NotFoundException when bed does not exist
RoomService updateBedStatus throws BadRequestException for an invalid transition
RoomService updateBedStatus updates bed status for a valid transition
RoomService updateBedStatus starts a housekeeping log when status transitions to CLEANING
RoomService getBedsForRoom returns all beds for a given room ordered by bedNumber
RoomService completeHousekeeping throws NotFoundException when no active housekeeping job exists
RoomService completeHousekeeping marks housekeeping as COMPLETED with completedById
OtService create throws BadRequestException when scheduledEnd is before scheduledStart
OtService create throws BadRequestException when a conflicting booking exists
OtService create creates a booking when no conflict exists
OtService create stores parsed Date objects for scheduledStart and scheduledEnd
OtService findAll returns bookings filtered by date
OtService findAll filters by surgeonId when provided
OtService findAll filters by OT status when provided
OtService cancelBooking throws NotFoundException when booking does not exist
OtService cancelBooking throws BadRequestException when booking is already COMPLETED
OtService cancelBooking throws BadRequestException when booking is already CANCELLED
OtService cancelBooking cancels a BOOKED booking and stores the reason
OtService updatePreopChecklist sets status to PREOP_CHECK when all checklist items are checked
OtService updatePreopChecklist does not set PREOP_CHECK when some checklist items are unchecked
OtService startOt throws BadRequestException when booking is not in PREOP_CHECK status
OtService startOt sets status to IN_PROGRESS and records actualStart
OtService completeOt throws BadRequestException when booking is not IN_PROGRESS
OtService completeOt sets status to COMPLETED and records actualEnd
OtService postponeBooking sets status to POSTPONED with new schedule

tests.title: NotificationService send() — SMS channel creates a NotificationLog record with QUEUED status
NotificationService send() — SMS channel routes to QueueService.enqueueSms for SMS channel
NotificationService send() — SMS channel returns the saved log record
NotificationService send() — EMAIL channel routes to QueueService.enqueueEmail for EMAIL channel
NotificationService send() — EMAIL channel uses default subject when templateCode is absent
NotificationService send() — WHATSAPP channel routes to QueueService.enqueueWhatsApp for WHATSAPP channel
NotificationService send() — WHATSAPP channel falls back to general_notification templateCode when none provided
NotificationService send() — PUSH channel does NOT call any queue service method for PUSH channel
NotificationService send() — PUSH channel marks log as SENT via logRepo.update for PUSH channel
NotificationService renderTemplate() replaces known variables in the template
NotificationService renderTemplate() keeps placeholder intact when variable is missing
NotificationService renderTemplate() replaces multiple occurrences of the same variable
NotificationService createTemplate() creates and saves a notification template
NhcxService createClaim() throws NotFoundException when patient not found
NhcxService createClaim() creates a claim with DRAFT status and embedded FHIR bundle
NhcxService createClaim() embeds a FHIR ClaimBundle with Claim and Patient resources
NhcxService submitClaim() — sandbox mode throws NotFoundException when claim does not exist
NhcxService submitClaim() — sandbox mode updates status to SUBMITTED with a mock nhcxClaimId in sandbox mode
NhcxService updateClaimStatus() throws NotFoundException when claim not found
NhcxService updateClaimStatus() sets resolvedAt when status is APPROVED
NhcxService updateClaimStatus() does NOT set resolvedAt for QUERY_RAISED status
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps APPROVED webhook status to NhcxClaimStatus.APPROVED
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps DENIED webhook status to NhcxClaimStatus.DENIED
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() maps PARTIALLY_APPROVED webhook status correctly
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() silently ignores webhook for unknown claimId
NhcxService handleNhcxWebhook() ignores unknown status strings
NhcxService getClaim() returns claim when found
NhcxService getClaim() throws NotFoundException when claim not found
DoctorService createConsultation() serializes diagnoses array to a JSON string
DoctorService createConsultation() sets facilityId and doctorId on the consultation
DoctorService createConsultation() converts followUpDate string to a Date object
DoctorService createConsultation() leaves diagnoses undefined when not provided
DoctorService getConsultation() returns the consultation when found
DoctorService getConsultation() throws NotFoundException when consultation does not exist
DoctorService completeConsultation() sets isComplete to true and completedAt timestamp
DoctorService completeConsultation() throws NotFoundException when consultation is not found
DoctorService completeConsultation() merges dto fields onto the consultation
DoctorService finalizePrescription() sets status to FINALIZED and saves
DoctorService finalizePrescription() throws NotFoundException when prescription is not found
DoctorService getPrescription() throws NotFoundException when no prescription exists for the visit
DoctorService getPrescription() returns prescription with items when found
DoctorService getPrescription() returns empty items array when prescription has no items
DoctorService searchIcd10() queries both code and description with LIKE pattern
DoctorService searchIcd10() returns an empty array when no matches are found
DoctorService searchIcd10() limits results to 20 entries
DoctorService getCommonIcd10() queries only codes marked as isCommon with limit 50
DoctorService getCommonIcd10() returns the list of common ICD-10 codes
DoctorService createPrescription() sets prescribedById and prescriptionDate
DoctorService updateConsultation() serializes diagnoses and saves updated consultation
DoctorService updateConsultation() throws NotFoundException when consultation is not found
RedisService should be defined
RedisService blacklistToken() stores the JTI with the correct prefixed key and TTL
RedisService blacklistToken() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns true when the blacklist key holds "1"
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns false when the key does not exist (null)
RedisService isTokenBlacklisted() returns false (fail-open) when Redis throws
RedisService set() calls redis.set when no TTL is provided
RedisService set() calls redis.setex when a TTL is provided
RedisService set() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService get() returns the stored value
RedisService get() returns null when the key is missing
RedisService get() returns null when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService del() calls redis.del with the correct key
RedisService del() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService setJson() serialises the value to JSON and delegates to set()
RedisService getJson() deserialises a stored JSON string back to an object
RedisService getJson() returns null when the key is missing
RedisService getJson() returns null when the stored string is not valid JSON
RedisService increment() increments the counter and sets the TTL on the first call (count === 1)
RedisService increment() increments but does NOT reset TTL on subsequent calls (count > 1)
RedisService increment() returns 0 (safe fallback) when Redis throws
RedisService publish() publishes a message to the correct channel
RedisService publish() does not throw when Redis throws (degraded mode)
RedisService isHealthy() returns true when ping responds with "PONG"
RedisService isHealthy() returns false when ping responds with an unexpected value
RedisService isHealthy() returns false when Redis throws
OperationsCrmService createShift creates and saves a staff roster entry with facilityId
OperationsCrmService findShifts filters by date when provided
OperationsCrmService findShifts filters by wardId and shiftType when provided
OperationsCrmService findShifts returns all shifts when no filters provided
OperationsCrmService createPreAuth creates a pre-auth record with requestedById set
OperationsCrmService getConsumableItems returns active consumable items sorted by name
OperationsCrmService getConsumableItems returns empty array when no consumables exist
OperationsCrmService recordConsumption throws NotFoundException when ward inventory does not exist
OperationsCrmService recordConsumption throws BadRequestException when stock is insufficient
OperationsCrmService recordConsumption deducts stock and creates a consumption record
OperationsCrmService updatePreAuth throws NotFoundException when pre-auth record does not exist
OperationsCrmService updatePreAuth sets respondedAt when status is APPROVED
OperationsCrmService updatePreAuth sets submittedAt when status transitions to SUBMITTED
OperationsCrmService swapShift throws NotFoundException when shift does not exist
OperationsCrmService swapShift marks shift as SWAPPED and records swappedWithStaffId
